scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @secops-agent/shared && npm run build -w @secops-agent/wazuh-secops && npm run build -w @secops-agent/shuffle-secops && npm run build -w @secops-agent/server && npm run build -w @secops-agent/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @secops-agent/shared && npm run build -w @secops-agent/wazuh-secops && npm run build -w @secops-agent/shuffle-secops && npm run typecheck -w @secops-agent/server && npm run typecheck -w @secops-agent/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @secops-agent/shared && npm run test -w @secops-agent/wazuh-secops && npm run test -w @secops-agent/shuffle-secops && npm run test -w @secops-agent/server && npm run test -w @secops-agent/web
